To analyze the rental market in Miami, Florida, we first load the dataset using Pandas and calculate the mean, median, and standard deviation of rental prices. * * *  
Next, we identify outliers using the Z-score method and segment the data by property type, such as single-family homes and condos. * * *  
Finally, we visualize the results using Matplotlib to display the distribution of rental prices and highlight outliers. * * *
